_comment: Health overlay for the architecture map. status = 'broken' (red ring) or 'warn' (amber ring). Add/edit entries; node keys are 'table:NAME','fn:NAME','rpc:NAME','client:path','ext:host'. Re-run scan.py to apply.

table:course_admins.note: Settings-panel PIN read/update fails — table is deny-all RLS and the panel writes it directly. Move PIN read/update into an edge function.

table:user_profiles.note: RLS still allow-all: anyone with the public key can read PII (email/phone/dob) and edit any row. Enforcing policies drafted; cutover pending.

table:chat_messages.note: RLS lockdown deferred — chat write-path writes auth.uid() which != profile_id; needs client fix + a membership helper before securing.

table:chat_rooms.note: Same chat write-path / membership issue as chat_messages — RLS deferred.

table:chat_room_members.note: Self-referential membership needs a SECURITY DEFINER helper before RLS can be enforced (recursion risk).

table:webauthn_credentials.note: Read/written pre-auth via the public anon key (biometric login). Move the flow to an edge function before locking the table.

fn:mint-supabase-jwt.note: DEAD approach (self-minted JWT, required a private key Supabase won't hand over). Superseded by line-oauth-exchange + the custom access token hook. Safe to delete.

fn:line-auth-session.note: LIFF in-app session creation (v2 magic-link) deployed 2026-06-13; pending real in-app device verification before the RLS cutover.
